TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Beyhing bay hnyuwan mi mdakil dxral na wirin ka wirin boyak, qhuni na u beyhing balay, kiya u rudan bay qhuni kari bay hngak wamil na, smkuxul bay karac mtarux mi mhuriq, nniqan na u asi bay ka mtsasaw mi hriqan, mniq mdakil ddwiyaq ckcka mi llbu Haypa, qtaan bay hriqan lnglingay ssiyaw bbuyu, mhru mniq hhrus qhuni ruma. Wirin boyak nii u, dsediq cbiyaw, pngalan dha ka pusu qhuni, slmuun na phiyu uruc sapah, so ka beywi ta, ndaan qmanga uruc hakaw qsiya, kiya u snalu na qhuni ini bay sburaw mi hmtur sdhriq, so kiya daw ddiyun dha bay psalu beywi. Dsediq cnduray daw u, saan dha mbtunux pcpingan smalu phpah sapah mi slmuun dha qqtaan, rabu na qhuni u phmaan kulu phpah, beyhing na bubu qhuni u smluun dha kulu psaan phpah, qqiya sluwan, lqling qhuni mnmu, uruc mi qtinuh qhuni dni phmaan hbil. Kluwan qhuni nii u, cbiyaw han, adaw ka ini hmtur sluwan bbriun mi ou bay briun nganguc, wada dha pqraqan kana da, saya daw uka hari snalu da, snalu qqiya nii u ou bay pneyyah klwaan icin. .
S.PHON: b…ôńßiŇč baj ńßnjuwan mi mdakil dx…ĺal na wi…ĺin ka wi…ĺin bojak, qńßuni na u b…ôńßiŇč balaj, kija u …ĺudan baj qńßuni ka…ĺi baj ńßŇčak wamil na, smkuxul baj ka…ĺa ¶ mta…ĺux mi mńßu…ĺiq, nniqan na u asi baj ka mtsasaw mi ńß…ĺiqan, mniq mdakil ddwijaq ¶k ¶ka mi llbu ńßajpa, qtaan baj ńß…ĺiqan lŇčliŇčaj ssijaw bbuju, mńß…ĺu mniq ńßńß…ĺus qńßuni …ĺuma. wi…ĺin bojak nii u, ds…ôdiq ¶bijaw, pŇčalan dńßa ka pusu qńßuni, slmuun na pńßiju u…ĺu ¶ sapańß, so ka b…ôwi ta, ndaan qmaŇča u…ĺu ¶ ńßakaw qsija, kija u snalu na qńßuni ini baj sbu…ĺaw mi ńßmtu…ĺ sdńß…ĺiq, so kija daw ddijun dńßa baj psalu b…ôwi. ds…ôdiq ¶ndu…ĺaj daw u, saan dńßa mbtunux p ¶piŇčan smalu pńßpańß sapańß mi slmuun dńßa qqtaan, …ĺabu na qńßuni u pńßmaan kulu pńßpańß, b…ôńßiŇč na bubu qńßuni u smluun dńßa kulu psaan pńßpańß, qqija sluwan, lqliŇč qńßuni mnmu, u…ĺu ¶ mi qtinuńß qńßuni dni pńßmaan ńßbil. kluwan qńßuni nii u, ¶bijaw ńßan, adaw ka ini ńßmtu…ĺ sluwan bb…ĺiun mi ou baj b…ĺiun ŇčaŇču ¶, wada dńßa pq…ĺaqan kana da, saja daw uka ńßa…ĺi snalu da, snalu qqija nii u ou baj pn…ôjańß klwaan i ¶in. .
S.FORM: Beyhing bay hnyuwan mi mdakil dxral na wirin ka wirin boyak, qhuni na u beyhing balay, kiya u rudan bay qhuni kari bay hngak wamil na, smkuxul bay karac mtarux mi mhuriq, nniqan na u asi bay ka mtsasaw mi hriqan, mniq mdakil ddwiyaq ckcka mi llbu Haypa, qtaan bay hriqan lnglingay ssiyaw bbuyu, mhru mniq hhrus qhuni ruma. Wirin boyak nii u, dsediq cbiyaw, pngalan dha ka pusu qhuni, slmuun na phiyu uruc sapah, so ka beywi ta, ndaan qmanga uruc hakaw qsiya, kiya u snalu na qhuni ini bay sburaw mi hmtur sdhriq, so kiya daw ddiyun dha bay psalu beywi. Dsediq cnduray daw u, saan dha mbtunux pcpingan smalu phpah sapah mi slmuun dha qqtaan, rabu na qhuni u phmaan kulu phpah, beyhing na bubu qhuni u smluun dha kulu psaan phpah, qqiya sluwan, lqling qhuni mnmu, uruc mi qtinuh qhuni dni phmaan hbil. Kluwan qhuni nii u, cbiyaw han, adaw ka ini hmtur sluwan bbriun mi ou bay briun nganguc, wada dha pqraqan kana da, saya daw uka hari snalu da, snalu qqiya nii u ou bay pneyyah klwaan icin. .
S.PHON: b…ôńßiŇč baj ńßnjuwan mi mdakil dx…ĺal na wi…ĺin ka wi…ĺin bojak, qńßuni na u b…ôńßiŇč balaj, kija u …ĺudan baj qńßuni ka…ĺi baj ńßŇčak wamil na, smkuxul baj ka…ĺa ¶ mta…ĺux mi mńßu…ĺiq, nniqan na u asi baj ka mtsasaw mi ńß…ĺiqan, mniq mdakil ddwijaq ¶k ¶ka mi llbu ńßajpa, qtaan baj ńß…ĺiqan lŇčliŇčaj ssijaw bbuju, mńß…ĺu mniq ńßńß…ĺus qńßuni …ĺuma. wi…ĺin bojak nii u, ds…ôdiq ¶bijaw, pŇčalan dńßa ka pusu qńßuni, slmuun na pńßiju u…ĺu ¶ sapańß, so ka b…ôwi ta, ndaan qmaŇča u…ĺu ¶ ńßakaw qsija, kija u snalu na qńßuni ini baj sbu…ĺaw mi ńßmtu…ĺ sdńß…ĺiq, so kija daw ddijun dńßa baj psalu b…ôwi. ds…ôdiq ¶ndu…ĺaj daw u, saan dńßa mbtunux p ¶piŇčan smalu pńßpańß sapańß mi slmuun dńßa qqtaan, …ĺabu na qńßuni u pńßmaan kulu pńßpańß, b…ôńßiŇč na bubu qńßuni u smluun dńßa kulu psaan pńßpańß, qqija sluwan, lqliŇč qńßuni mnmu, u…ĺu ¶ mi qtinuńß qńßuni dni pńßmaan ńßbil. kluwan qńßuni nii u, ¶bijaw ńßan, adaw ka ini ńßmtu…ĺ sluwan bb…ĺiun mi ou baj b…ĺiun ŇčaŇču ¶, wada dńßa pq…ĺaqan kana da, saja daw uka ńßa…ĺi snalu da, snalu qqija nii u ou baj pn…ôjańß klwaan i ¶in. .
